description_long: This is a large, rectangular metal container with a corrugated surface, likely constructed from galvanized steel. The container is elongated, with closed sides and a hollow interior visible from the short ends, suggesting it is designed for storage or transport of goods. The exterior shows signs of weathering and rust, indicating it is intended for outdoor or industrial use. The top and sides are flat and reinforced, while the ends are open, possibly for loading or unloading. There are no visible handles, latches, or signage, giving it a utilitarian appearance. Its robust build and size suggest it is suitable for placement in urban environments such as construction sites, loading docks, or transport depots.
description: A large, weathered, rectangular metal container with a corrugated surface and open ends, designed for industrial or transport use.
description_view_0: End-on view showing the open, hollow interior and the rectangular profile of the container.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the long, corrugated metal surface with signs of rust and no visible openings or handles.
description_view_2: Opposite end-on view, similar to view 0, showing the open end and interior space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with the same corrugated metal surface and weathered appearance.
